description: Perform a structural load assessment in QBlade by designing a 3-blade rotor and analyzing its performance. Create a NACA 0012 airfoil (100 panels) with a polar generated at Re=1,000,000, Alpha -5 to 25, and extrapolated to 360 degrees. Use this airfoil for a rectangular blade with a 10m length, 0.5m hub radius, 1m chord, and 0 twist. Run a Wind Speed Sweep BEM Simulation from 5 to 25 m/s (step 1) with a fixed RPM of 60 and 0 pitch. Identify the Maximum Root Flapwise Bending Moment (My) from the results and write the value in Nm (rounded to the nearest integer) to /home/ga/Documents/projects/root_moment_report.txt.
